gaia2.scoring_note: Uses matched_fraction directly as score. Does NOT zero-out on count mismatch (unlike official GAIA2 CLI which requires exact count match). This aligns with GAIA which gives partial credit for partial completion.

A_baseline.note: No A/B/C split available (crashed before Phase 2)

gaia2.note: Partial results from 22 unique tasks (experiment crashed at task 26 due to ai_review_experience RuntimeError). First 3 tasks scored well (avg 56.7%) before augmented_prompt explosion degraded performance. With GAIA-aligned scoring, tasks that did most steps correctly but failed COUNT GATE (e.g., 0608 at ~7/8 matched) would still get ~87% instead of 0%.

fixes_applied.ai_review_non_fatal: src/v6/refine.py: RuntimeError → graceful fallback (return raw experience) on 3rd failure
fixes_applied.augmented_prompt_cap: src/v6/injection.py: max_chars=6000 hard trunk, top_k_success=3, top_k_failure=2
fixes_applied.system_prompt_src: src/v6/agent_prompt.py: extracted from runner, with anti-repeat Rule 5 + twist detection
fixes_applied.gaia2_scoring: src/v6/gaia2_judge.py: removed COUNT GATE, score = matched_fraction (partial-credit)
fixes_applied.runtime_dedup: latest_runner.py: skip execution if (tool_id, args) already seen in current task
fixes_applied.loop_hard_limit: latest_runner.py: 3 consecutive loop breaks → force task termination

known_issues.augmented_prompt_explosion: After task 5, injected experience grew to 23K+ chars (FIXED: max_chars=6000)
known_issues.death_loop: Task 0141 repeated op-001 14 times (FIXED: anti-loop hard limit + runtime dedup)
known_issues.count_gate_false_negatives: Tasks like 0608 had ~7/8 correct steps but scored 0% (FIXED: GAIA-aligned scoring)
